title: White Scars
name: White Scars
battleCry: For the Khan and the Emperor!
motto: For the Khan and the Emperor!
lore: The Vth Legion of Jaghatai Khan. Born of the steppe-warriors of Chogoris, the White Scars are the masters of lightning warfare — striking from impossible angles, never holding ground, never standing still long enough to be pinned.

Their doctrine of constant movement and overwhelming momentum made them the most feared fast-assault force in the Great Crusade. Where other Legions crushed worlds, the White Scars swept over them like a storm and were gone.

After the Heresy, the Khan rode into the Webway in pursuit of Dark Eldar raiders and never returned. His sons still race across the galaxy in his name — swift, proud, and waiting for the storm to come back.
